tldr: Headlines divide cleanly: Western and opposition outlets lead with security threats (strikes, enrichment escalation), while Russian, Chinese, and Iranian outlets frame uranium enrichment as a sovereign political right.

bottom_line: Headline framing maps almost perfectly onto geopolitical alignment: security and non-proliferation from the West and opposition; sovereignty and diplomacy from Russia, China, and Tehran. No bucket straddles the divide.
